brief_html:
Solar/Geo: SFI ~142, sunspots ~88, Kp ~2 (Quiet), solar wind ~380 km/s, Bz neutral.
HF (1.8–30 MHz): MUF ~26–32 MHz (peak ~32 MHz); best bands 15 m / 12 m midday, 40 m/60 m evening; NVIS ~08:00–12:00 UTC.
VHF/UHF: Tropo low – no significant ducting. Sporadic-E very low. Aurora: Auroral activity negligible.
Digital & Specials: Meteor scatter: baseline only. FT8/FT4 strong on 20 m/17 m EU midday.
Micro-Note (Zone 10): NVIS 40 m/60 m excellent ~08:30–11:30 UTC. 2 m/70 cm to EI/GI/GM: Tropo low.
Actionable Notes: • Deploy 40 m NVIS 08:00–11:30 UTC • Monitor 15 m/12 m ~12:00–16:00 UTC • Keep 60 m standby evening.
